NIST_SP_800_208.stipulation: Stateful verification of Hash-Based Signatures (HBS) or transition to ML-DSA (FIPS 204).
NIST_SP_800_208.evidence: Crypto Agility Layer exclusively generates ML-DSA signatures in Level: PQC mode.

NSA_CNSA_2_0.stipulation: Software and firmware must fully support ML-DSA and ML-KEM by 2025. By 2030, all systems must exclusively use CNSA 2.0 algorithms.
NSA_CNSA_2_0.evidence: Phase 3 Hybrid Mode active. Classical ECDH/ECDSA fallback pathways still enabled for legacy clients until 2028.

FIPS_140_3.stipulation: Implementation relies strictly on FIPS boundary entropy and validated DRBGs.
FIPS_140_3.evidence: Crypto Agility module utilizes standardized Go crypto/rand matching SP 800-90A DRBGs.

hybrid_crypto_mode.digital_signatures: Composite signature format: [uint16 Classical Length] + [Classical ECDSA] + [PQC ML-DSA]
hybrid_crypto_mode.key_encapsulation: Shared secret derived via KDF(Classical_SS || PQC_SS)
